failure_modes.text: Model worship can push the team into prediction machinery even when the target is unclear, the data is thin, or causal understanding matters more.
failure_modes.mitigation: Clarify the objective before building the model: check whether the task needs prediction, causal explanation, or decision support, and choose the method accordingly.

failure_modes.text: Premature analysis can waste effort by fitting models before the problem structure, objective, or testable hypotheses are clear.
failure_modes.mitigation: Validate before trusting: require out-of-sample testing and check whether the model's performance holds on data it has never seen before fitting to production use.

failure_modes.text: Distribution neglect can make a model look solid while hiding the tail outcomes or censored failures that matter most.
failure_modes.mitigation: Inspect the tails: report model performance on extreme cases and censored outcomes, not just overall accuracy, to catch distribution neglect.

premortem_questions.text: Are you primarily trying to understand the drivers of causation, or are you primarily trying to predict a state of the world?
premortem_questions.source_quote: Are you primarily trying to understand the drivers of causation, or are you primarily trying to predict a state of the world?

premortem_questions.text: Is the worst case bad enough?
premortem_questions.source_quote: Is the worst case bad enough?

premortem_questions.text: What outside-view baseline or reference class should discipline this model before we trust its fit on our local sample?

heuristics.text: Decide up front whether the task is causation or prediction so the model class matches the real objective.
Start with scoping reconnaissance and simple summary structure before moving to heavy learning machinery.
Use simulations or scenario analysis to test how the model behaves across plausible states instead of trusting one fitted view.

curation_notes.summary: The intervention layer stays on framing the modeling objective correctly, avoiding premature complexity, and testing for generalization rather than mere fit.
donor_drops: Did not preserve implementation-detail sprawl because the raw source is strongest on objective selection, reconnaissance, and anti-model-worship discipline.
open_questions: The outside-view premortem question is reviewed compression over several source passages on baseline and reference-class discipline.

allies: The source is rich on systems-thinking, hypothesis-driven problem solving, and game-theory simulations.
antagonists: The raw source explicitly names representativeness-heuristic, survivorship-bias, and confirmation-bias pressures.
structured_tensions: The raw source explicitly preserves tensions against representativeness-heuristic, survivorship-bias, and confirmation-bias.
